# Copilot Task: Python Calculator App

## Objective
Build a Python calculator with unit tests and coverage.

---

## Requirements
- add, subtract, multiply, divide
- handle divide by zero
- handle divide by decimal numbers
- handle negative numbers
- handle large numbers
- handle infinity

---

## Project Structure
calculator/
    __init__.py
    core.py

tests/
    test_calculator.py

---

## Implementation Rules
- Use clean functions
- Add type hints
- Raise ValueError for divide by zero
- Always add comments to explain complex logic

---

## Testing
- Use pytest
- Cover all edge cases
- Provide descriptive test names
- Add comments to explain test cases

---

## Coverage
- Minimum 90%

---

## Git
- Commit message: "Initial calculator implementation"
